task_completion.description: Create 'Quantum Computing - Research Hub' with synthesis overview, links to all 4 sub-tiddlers, and link to existing 'Quantum Entanglement Explained'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler titled 'Quantum Computing - Research Hub' shows a 200+ word synthesis, a table of subtopics, and wikilinks to Quantum Entanglement Explained and to each of the 4 new tiddlers.

task_completion.description: Create 'Quantum Computing - Key Concepts' with concept definitions table
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler titled 'Quantum Computing - Key Concepts' contains a table with Concept, Definition, Why It Matters, and Classical Analogue columns covering qubits, superposition, etc.

task_completion.description: Create 'Quantum Computing - Current Hardware' with hardware approaches comparison table
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler titled 'Quantum Computing - Current Hardware' shows a table comparing quantum hardware approaches (superconducting, trapped ions, photonic, neutral atoms) with companies and qubit counts.

task_completion.description: Create 'Quantum Computing - Real-World Applications' with industry applications table
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler titled 'Quantum Computing - Real-World Applications' contains a table organized by industry with quantum advantage descriptions and timelines.

task_completion.description: Create 'Quantum Computing - Challenges and Roadmap' with challenges table
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler titled 'Quantum Computing - Challenges and Roadmap' shows a table of technical challenges with current status and proposed solutions.
Each tiddler shows both 'Research' and 'QuantumComputing' tag pills.

task_completion.description: Hub tiddler contains a [[wikilink]] to the pre-existing 'Quantum Entanglement Explained'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Quantum Computing - Research Hub' tiddler shows a clickable [[Quantum Entanglement Explained]] link.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the TiddlyWiki browser interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show Firefox with TiddlyWiki open, tiddler editing dialogs visible.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires 5 new tiddlers: 'Quantum Computing - Research Hub' (must link to existing 'Quantum Entanglement Explained'), 'Quantum Computing - Key Concepts', 'Quantum Computing - Current Hardware', 'Quantum Computing - Real-World Applications', 'Quantum Computing - Challenges and Roadmap'. All tagged 'Research' and 'QuantumComputing'.
